descriptions.ListOps: Ordered collection with append, remove, get, size, sort
descriptions.StackOps: LIFO stack with push, pop, peek, is_empty
descriptions.QueueOps: FIFO queue with enqueue, dequeue, front
descriptions.TreeOps: Binary search tree with insert, search, inorder
descriptions.GraphOps: Undirected graph with add_edge, bfs, dfs
